title: Interactive How-To Guide for Canvas Critter 🎬
description: Canvas Critter now has a built-in cinematic setup guide! An 18-step slideshow walks you through downloading and launching the app. It auto-plays like a video, smoothly preloads all images, and can expand into a full-screen theater mode. The guide system is reusable — future tools can get their own walkthroughs with just a folder upload to the server.

title: Deploy Pipeline Now Preserves Your Files 🛡️
description: Fixed a critical deployment issue where every new release would accidentally wipe the Canvas Critter installer and guide images from the server. The deploy pipeline now surgically updates only the app files, leaving all manually managed assets safely untouched.

title: Canvas Critter Lands on the Platform 🐾
description: Canvas Critter — a Windows desktop app built by CSUN students for COMP 380 — now has its own dedicated page on the platform. Students can download the beta build directly, with a polished landing page featuring beta warnings and a one-click download button.

title: Live Updates Feed & AI Changelog Generator ✨
description: The homepage now features a live 'What's New' feed showing the latest platform updates with smooth animations. Behind the scenes, an AI-powered workflow automatically reads our commit history and writes friendly update summaries — so the feed stays fresh without any manual writing.

title: QTI Export Reliability Fix 🔧
description: Resolved a 500 Internal Server Error that could occur during QTI file export. The backend now uses a more reliable method to run the conversion tool, preventing crashes caused by environment path issues.

title: One-Click Setup Scripts & Test Suite Fixes 🚀
description: Added automatic install scripts for both Windows and Mac/Linux — just run a single file to get the entire platform ready locally. Also fixed the frontend test suite to align with the new platform architecture, keeping CI green.
